BackstoryDef.title: corporate drill cadet
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in a Dominion corporate military training program from an early age. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to follow orders, maintain equipment, and hit what [PAWN_pronoun] aimed at.

BackstoryDef.title: gang soldier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was fighting for one of the lower district gangs before [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to enlist anywhere official. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the kind of combat that has no rules and no referees.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate security ward
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the care of a Dominion corporate security division, raised alongside the children of professional soldiers and trained accordingly. [PAWN_pronoun] knew how to handle a weapon before [PAWN_pronoun] knew much else.

BackstoryDef.title: pit fighter's apprentice
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] learned to fight in the pit circuits of the lower districts, trained by a veteran who saw potential and decided to do something with it. [PAWN_pronoun] learned fast because the alternative was losing.

BackstoryDef.title: factory district scrapper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived the factory districts by being harder to hurt than the people around [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to throw a punch before [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read and never found a reason to reverse the priority.

BackstoryDef.title: enforcer's shadow
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] followed the corporate enforcers of [PAWN_possessive] district everywhere, watching and learning. [PAWN_pronoun] absorbed their techniques and eventually surpassed most of them.

BackstoryDef.title: military brat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up on a Dominion military installation, surrounded by soldiers and their equipment from birth. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the mechanics of weapons before [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to be trusted with one.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate conscript
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was taken from the lower districts by a Dominion corporate military recruiter at an age that made the word volunteer complicated. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained quickly and thoroughly.

BackstoryDef.title: combat sports prodigy
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] showed an exceptional aptitude for combat sports from an early age and was placed in a Dominion training program that took that aptitude seriously. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that being exceptional at violence is a useful thing to be in the Dominion.

BackstoryDef.title: lower district knife fighter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a district where carrying a blade was a practical decision rather than an aggressive one. [PAWN_pronoun] became very good at using it.

BackstoryDef.title: watchtower sentry
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a sentry on the watchtowers of a Dominion corporate installation, learning patience and precision in equal measure. [PAWN_pronoun] became a very good shot waiting for threats that rarely came.

BackstoryDef.title: underground fighting circuit kid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] competed in the underground fighting circuits of the lower districts from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read an opponent before the first exchange and end the fight before the third.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate sharpshooter trainee
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was identified as a natural marksman and placed in a Dominion corporate sharpshooter program. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to hit targets at distances that impressed [PAWN_possessive] instructors and unsettled [PAWN_possessive] peers.

BackstoryDef.title: street brawler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up settling disputes the only way the lower districts reliably settled them. [PAWN_pronoun] lost often at first. [PAWN_pronoun] stopped losing.

BackstoryDef.title: tower guard trainee
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] trained from childhood to serve in the private guard forces that protect the Dominion's upper class tower complexes. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the discipline and precision required to stand between wealthy people and whatever they feared.

BackstoryDef.title: scrapyard scrapper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up fighting over salvage in the waste zones at the edge of a factory district. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that the best tools are the ones you can fix yourself.

BackstoryDef.title: wandering trader's child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up traveling between Dominion settlements with [PAWN_possessive] family's trading operation, learning a little about a lot of places and a great deal about people. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that information is worth more than most goods.

BackstoryDef.title: discharged soldier's child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the care of a parent who had left the Dominion military and was not entirely sure what to do next. [PAWN_pronoun] inherited [PAWN_possessive] parent's skills and some of [PAWN_possessive] unresolved questions.

BackstoryDef.title: frontier settlement child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in one of the Dominion's outlying settlements, far enough from the corporate centers that self reliance was not a philosophy but a necessity. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to handle weapons and fix things and trust very few people.

BackstoryDef.title: traveling performer's child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up with a traveling performance troupe that moved between Dominion settlements, learning to read crowds, handle difficult situations, and occasionally pick pockets. [PAWN_pronoun] developed skills that proved useful in contexts the troupe never intended.

BackstoryDef.title: lower district gang runner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran messages and packages for the gangs of [PAWN_possessive] district, learning the layout of the lower levels and the people who operated in them. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that knowing things other people do not is a form of protection.

BackstoryDef.title: abandoned military dependent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was left in a Dominion military dependent facility when [PAWN_possessive] parent failed to return from an operation. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up around soldiers without belonging to any unit and learned to take what was useful from the environment and leave the rest.
